title: Clerk
doc_html:
§1405.  Clerk

The clerk of the Nineteenth Judicial District Court shall be ex officio the clerk of the family court.  

Added by Acts 1975, No. 89, §1.
doc_text:
§1405.  Clerk
The clerk of the Nineteenth Judicial District Court shall be ex officio the clerk of the family court.
Added by Acts 1975, No. 89, §1.
